{{Quote|Boom!|Boom|<ref name="The DarkStryder Campaign">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''</ref>}}
'''Boom''' was a [[Guudrian]] explosives expert and pyromaniac. He served on-board the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' during the hunt for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]].

==Biography==
Boom served on the same [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] ship as the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], [[Krudar]]. When the ship was destroyed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, Boom traveled with Krudar around the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] serving as hired gunners. When Krudar signed onto the ''FarStar'' following the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol]], he convinced the New Republic to take on Boom as well.

==Personality and traits==
Boom was a [[pyromania]]c, and loved explosions. Unlike most other beings, Boom would run ''towards'' an explosion when he heard it, rather than away from it. Despite this, he survived to become proficient at building explosive devices. Boom was also fascinated by anything that was bright or flickered. He carried two mini-flamers with him, which were originally used to light [[Cigarra/Legends|cigarras]]. Boom loved to test different objects to see how they burned, which didn't endear him to the crew of the ''FarStar'' when they found their belongings scorched and burnt. Krudar was the only being on the ship that could keep Boom under control, and acted as his interpreter during the mission.
